# ZeroPoint — Portable Proof Infrastructure for Autonomous Agents
# https://zeropoint.global
# Source: https://github.com/zeropoint-foundation/zeropoint

> ZeroPoint produces cryptographic proof of agent governance — policy decisions,
> signed receipts, and tamper-evident audit chains. Operators wrap agent
> toolchains with ZeroPoint to enforce policy and produce portable proof of
> every action, without requiring agent cooperation or modification.

## Core Primitives

- **Governance Gate**: Evaluates every agent action against policy rules before execution
- **Signed Receipts**: Cryptographic proof of what happened, who did it, and what policy allowed it
- **Delegation Chains**: Verifiable capability grants that flow from operator → agent → sub-agent
- **Tamper-Evident Audit**: Blake3 hash-chained log of every decision, immutable after the fact
- **Trust Tiers**: Graduated autonomy (Tier 0 → Tier 1 → Tier 2) as trust is earned

## Quick Start

```bash
git clone https://github.com/zeropoint-foundation/zeropoint
cd zeropoint && cargo build --release
./target/release/zp-server
```

## API Base URL

```
http://localhost:3000/api/v1
```

## Key Endpoints

### Guard Evaluation (primary integration point)
```
POST /api/v1/guard/evaluate
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "action": "execute shell command: ls -la",
  "action_type": "Execute",
  "trust_tier": "Tier1"
}

Response: {
  "decision": "Allow",
  "allowed": true,
  "risk_level": "Medium",
  "trust_tier": "Tier1",
  "rationale": "Action permitted under current policy",
  "applied_rules": ["HarmPrincipleRule", "SovereigntyRule"],
  "receipt_id": "rcpt-...",
  "audit_entry_id": "...",
  "audit_entry_hash": "...",
  "timestamp": "2026-03-06T..."
}
```

### Receipt Generation
```
POST /api/v1/receipts/generate
{ "action": "deployed model v2.1", "status": "Success", "policy_decision": "Allow" }
```

### Capability Grant
```
POST /api/v1/capabilities/grant
{ "grantee": "<destination_hash>", "capability": "Execute", "scope": ["python"], "max_delegation_depth": 3 }
```

### Capability Delegation
```
POST /api/v1/capabilities/delegate
{ "parent_grant_id": "grant-...", "grantee": "<destination_hash>", "capability": "Execute", "scope": ["python"] }
```

### Chain Verification
```
POST /api/v1/capabilities/verify-chain
{ "grant_ids": ["grant-aaa", "grant-bbb", "grant-ccc"] }
```

### Audit Trail
```
GET  /api/v1/audit/entries?limit=50
GET  /api/v1/audit/chain-head
GET  /api/v1/audit/verify
```

### Policy Introspection
```
GET  /api/v1/policy/rules
```

### Health & Identity
```
GET  /api/v1/health
GET  /api/v1/identity
GET  /api/v1/stats
GET  /api/v1/security/posture
GET  /api/v1/genesis
```

## Action Types

Chat, Read, Write, ApiCall, Execute, FileOp, CredentialAccess, ConfigChange,
KeyDelegation, PeerIntroduction

## Trust Tiers

- **Tier0**: No signing. Local filesystem trust only.
- **Tier1**: Local key signs modules. Tamper detection via hash verification.
- **Tier2**: Genesis root key, full delegation chain, all modules signed.

## Receipt Types

Intent (intn-), Design (dsgn-), Approval (appr-), Execution (rcpt-),
Payment (pymt-), Access (accs-)

## Trust Grades

- **D**: Signed receipt only
- **C**: Sandboxed execution (container/VM/jail)
- **B**: Hardware key + OS integrity
- **A**: TEE with hardware root of trust

## Risk Levels

- **Low**: Chat, Read
- **Medium**: Write, FileOp
- **High**: ApiCall, Execute, Delete, ConfigChange
- **Critical**: CredentialAccess, KeyDelegation

## Cryptography

- Hashing: Blake3 (64-char hex)
- Signing: Ed25519 (base64 signatures, hex public keys)
- Chain: Each audit entry links to previous via prev_hash

## Policy Decisions

Allow, Block, Warn, Review, Sanitize

## Constitutional Rules (non-removable)

- HarmPrincipleRule: Block actions that could cause irreversible harm
- SovereigntyRule: Ensure operator retains ultimate authority
- CatastrophicActionRule: Escalate high-risk actions for review

## Integration Patterns

1. **Wrap existing agent**: Proxy agent tool calls through ZeroPoint guard endpoint
2. **MCP server**: Run ZeroPoint as an MCP tool server for Claude Code
3. **PATH shim**: Place ZeroPoint binary shims ahead of real tools in PATH
4. **Sidecar**: Run alongside agent process, intercept via local API
